ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "iso2" TEXT /* 2-letter ISO code for the location */,
  "iso3" TEXT /* 3-letter ISO code for the location */,
  "code3" INTEGER /* 3-digit code for the location */,
  "FIPS" INTEGER /* FIPS code for the location */,
  "Admin2" TEXT /* Admin2 code for the location */,
  "Province_State" TEXT /* Province or state name */,
  "Country_Region" TEXT /* Country or region name */,
  "Lat" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "Long_" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "Combined_Key" TEXT /* Combined key for the location */,
  "Population" INTEGER /* Total population of the location */,
  "Time_Zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the location */,
  "Last_Updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the location data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the case was reported */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the case was reported */,
  "cases" INTEGER /* Number of cases reported */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Verification status of the data */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the cases */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the cases */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospitalizations" (
  "hospitalization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospitalization */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the hospitalization was reported */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the hospitalization was reported */,
  "hospitalizations" INTEGER /* Number of hospitalizations reported */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Verification status of the data */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the hospitalizations */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the hospitalizations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospitalization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitalizations_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deaths" (
  "death_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each death */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the death was reported */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the death was reported */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths reported */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Verification status of the data */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the deaths */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the deaths */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("death_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deaths_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the demographic was reported */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the demographic */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the demographic */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the demographic */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the demographic */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the demographic */,
  "health_conditions" TEXT /* Pre-existing health conditions of the demographic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g. admin, health official) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g. read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the alert was triggered */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the alert was triggered */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g. low, medium, high) */,
  "triggered_by" TEXT /* Who or what triggered the alert */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g. active, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "read" INTEGER /* Read status of the notification */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the notification (e.g. email, SMS, in-app) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the data source */,
  "reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the data source (e.g. high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the data was reported */,
  "cases" INTEGER /* Number of cases reported */,
  "hospitalizations" INTEGER /* Number of hospitalizations reported */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths reported */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Verification status of the data */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of the data (e.g. cases, hospitalizations, deaths) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the specific data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics data point */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the analytics data was generated */,
  "cases" INTEGER /* Number of cases */,
  "hospitalizations" INTEGER /* Number of hospitalizations */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group for analytics */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex for analytics */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race for analytics */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity for analytics */,
  "health_conditions" TEXT /* Pre-existing health conditions for analytics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)
